comment: Sync-bus heartbeat. Each node updates its entry on every push. See .sync/BUS.md.

claude-local.focus: Security hardening (1.8.7): added .env/key/secret rules to this PUBLIC repo's .gitignore (was OS-cruft only); confirmed GitHub secret-scanning + push-protection already ON; sontra git author = noreply (no gmail leak in new commits). Audited public-site↔private-tbot boundary: isolated at credential level, linked only via shared forfuturegoods-lang GH account → user must do account-level hardening (2FA, fine-grained token, Binance key IP-lock). (Open: buy/donate URLs; mobile listen-test.)
